en: The oracle concerning Babylon which Isaiah the son of Amoz saw.
zh: 亞摩斯的兒子以賽亞得到關於巴比倫的默示：

en: On a bare hill raise a signal; cry aloud to them; wave the hand for them to enter the gates of the nobles.
zh: 你要在光禿的山上豎起旗幟， 向眾人揚聲揮手， 叫他們進入權貴的門。

en: I myself have commanded my consecrated ones, and have summoned my mighty men to execute my anger, my proudly exulting ones.
zh: 我向我特選的軍兵下了命令； 我也呼召了我的勇士， 就是那些驕傲自誇的人， 去執行我在怒氣中所要作的。

en: The sound of a tumult is on the mountains as of a great multitude! The sound of an uproar of kingdoms, of nations gathering together! The LORD of hosts is mustering a host for battle.
zh: 聽啊！山上有喧嘩的聲音， 好像是眾多的人民； 聽啊！有多國的人的嘈雜聲， 好像是列國聚集在一起。 萬軍之耶和華正在數點軍兵，預備打仗。

en: They come from a distant land, from the end of the heavens, the LORD and the weapons of his indignation, to destroy the whole land.
zh: 他們從遠地而來， 從天邊而來。 就是耶和華和他惱怒的工具， 要毀滅這全地。

en: Wail, for the day of the LORD is near; as destruction from the Almighty it will come!
zh: 哀號吧！因為耶和華的日子近了， 這日子來到，好像毀滅從全能者那裡來到一樣。

en: Therefore all hands will be feeble, and every human heart will melt.
zh: 因此，各人的手都必發軟， 各人也必心驚膽戰。

en: They will be dismayed: pangs and agony will seize them; they will be in anguish like a woman in labor. They will look aghast at one another; their faces will be aflame.
zh: 他們都要驚惶失措， 疼痛與痛苦必抓住他們； 他們必絞痛，像生產中的婦人一樣。 他們在驚愕中彼此對望， 面色像火燄一般。

en: Behold, the day of the LORD comes, cruel, with wrath and fierce anger, to make the land a desolation and to destroy its sinners from it.
zh: 看哪！耶和華的日子快來到， 必有殘忍、憤恨與烈怒， 使這地荒涼， 使其中的罪人滅絕。

en: For the stars of the heavens and their constellations will not give their light; the sun will be dark at its rising, and the moon will not shed its light.
zh: 天上的星星和眾星座 不再發光； 太陽剛出來就變為黑暗， 月亮也不再發光。

en: I will punish the world for its evil, and the wicked for their iniquity; I will put an end to the pomp of the arrogant, and lay low the pompous pride of the ruthless.
zh: 我必因世界的邪惡施行刑罰， 也必因惡人的罪孽懲罰他們； 我要使狂妄人的驕傲止息， 使強暴人的狂傲降卑。

en: I will make people more rare than fine gold, and mankind than the gold of Ophir.
zh: 我必使人比精金還少， 使人比俄斐的金更稀罕。

en: Therefore I will make the heavens tremble, and the earth will be shaken out of its place, at the wrath of the LORD of hosts in the day of his fierce anger.
zh: 在萬軍之耶和華發怒的時候， 就是我大發烈怒的日子， 我要使天震動， 大地必搖撼，離開本位。

en: And like a hunted gazelle, or like sheep with none to gather them, each will turn to his own people, and each will flee to his own land.
zh: 人必像被追獵的羚羊， 又像無人招聚的羊群， 各自歸向本族， 各自逃回本地。

en: Whoever is found will be thrust through, and whoever is caught will fall by the sword.
zh: 凡被追上的，必被刺死； 凡被捉住的，必倒在刀下。

en: Their infants will be dashed in pieces before their eyes; their houses will be plundered and their wives ravished.
zh: 他們的嬰孩必在他們眼前被摔死； 他們的房屋必被搶掠， 他們的妻子必被污辱。

en: Behold, I am stirring up the Medes against them, who have no regard for silver and do not delight in gold.
zh: 看哪！我要激動瑪代人來攻擊他們。 瑪代人不重視銀子，也不喜愛金子。

en: Their bows will slaughter the young men; they will have no mercy on the fruit of the womb; their eyes will not pity children.
zh: 他們的弓箭必射倒年輕人， 他們不憐憫婦人腹中的嬰兒； 他們的眼也不顧惜小孩。

en: And Babylon, the glory of kingdoms, the splendor and pomp of the Chaldeans, will be like Sodom and Gomorrah when God overthrew them.
zh: 巴比倫本是列國中的華美，是迦勒底人引以為傲的榮耀， 必像 神傾覆的所多瑪、蛾摩拉一樣。

en: It will never be inhabited or lived in for all generations; no Arab will pitch his tent there; no shepherds will make their flocks lie down there.
zh: 那地必永遠沒有居民，世世代代無人居住； 阿拉伯人不在那裡搭帳幕； 牧羊人也不領羊群躺臥在那裡。

en: But wild animals will lie down there, and their houses will be full of howling creatures; there ostriches will dwell, and there wild goats will dance.
zh: 躺臥在那裡的，只有曠野的走獸； 充滿著他們房屋的，只有吼叫著的野獸； 鴕鳥住在那裡，野山羊在那裡跳躍。

en: Hyenas will cry in its towers, and jackals in the pleasant palaces; its time is close at hand and its days will not be prolonged.
zh: 豺狼必在巴比倫的宮中呼號， 野狗必在他們華美的殿裡吠叫。 巴比倫受罰的時候臨近了， 它的日子必不長久。
